name: Puppy Chow
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large Dutch oven, melt the butter over medium heat.
2. Add the melted chocolate and peanut butter to the Dutch oven. Stir constantly until all ingredients are well combined.
3. Remove from heat and stir in the Crispix cereal.
4. Spoon the mixture into a shallow dish to coat the Crispix evenly.
5. Sprinkle the powdered sugar over the Crispix mixture. Use a brown paper bag to toss the Crispix, ensuring it is evenly coated with powdered sugar.
6. Serve and enjoy this delightful treat that's perfect for any occasion and loved by children alike.
